steps.title: Find the cause of the glow
steps.content: The student's goal is to explain what makes the neon sculpture glow. The relevant note gives the mechanism: an electrical current passes through gas in the tubes and makes the gas glow.

steps.title: Reject descriptions without cause
steps.content: A describes the sculpture's appearance. B describes how the tubes are shaped. C says the sculpture glows but does not explain why. None gives the electrical-current mechanism.

steps.title: State the mechanism
steps.content: An electrical current passing through the gas-filled tubes explains why Need Money for Cars glows white. The answer is D.
